posts.author: Binatica (Binatica)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
We are looking for monday accounts to test our new app that going to be launched in the marketplace.
You will get the app immediately, all we want is your honest feedback, and you will get a free account.
Any kind of company will be fit
Reach us in DM!

Cheers
Binatica
